So, why am I only giving three stars to an item that we liked so much that we ended up repurchasing? Because it doesn’t last. Despite us washing the jacket exactly as per the instructions on the tag, the fabric pilled after only a few washes. It also stained very easily. The pictures of the light pink jacket here enclosed are after five months of normal wear. I would not have repurchased it myself, but my daughter loves the look of this jacket so much that in the end the purchase was worth it.

title: Thin and poor quality
review_text: I really love the fit of these shirts and how incredibly comfortable they are, especially for the summer. However, the quality is really poor. I purchased two, one in white and one in lilac, and I was totally in love with them until they both snagged on the second or third wear. Mind you, all I’m doing is wearing them to go to Pilates and drive around doing errands so there is no reason for these to have snagged already. I am also washing them in a delicate cycle and air drying. Disappointed!
lulu_response_text: Thanks for sharing your experience with us—we love that this style delivers on fit and comfort. Quality concerns like snags aren't ideal and we'd love to offer support. We sent you an email to connect and continue the conversation.
